authorization_phrase_detected: YES start P174 POWER_LOTTO R2 decision review

p173_summary.honest_assessment: P173 NULL is a valid scientific result. Top 3 feature-based strategies show slightly above-random mean hits (0.961-0.964 vs 0.947) but the differences are well within random sampling variation. No corrected statistical evidence of predictive edge.

decision_context.user_goal: Exhaust all possible methods to find success-rate improvement. Not just combining old strategies, but starting from feature engineering or new strategies.
decision_context.r1_summary: P161-P170 found no defensible edge in existing 10 POWER_LOTTO strategies using Fourier, Markov, MidFreq, Orthogonal, FreqOrt, PP3, Precision, Zonal Entropy, Cold Number signals.
decision_context.r2_summary_so_far: P171 inventoried 10 feature families and 8 candidates. P172 selected Top 3 (C01/C02/C04). P173 evaluated Top 3 with n_oos=1413: all FAIL_CORRECTED. R2 deferred candidates (C03/C05/C06/C07) have NOT yet been evaluated.
decision_context.prior_probability_of_edge: LOW — consistent with R1 results and L91 (BIG_LOTTO, 6-item randomness test all pass). POWER_LOTTO shows no detectable departure from fair random in 1913 draws.

options_reviewed.name: Halt R2 and archive POWER_LOTTO research
options_reviewed.description: Accept cumulative NULL result across R1 (P161-P170) and R2 Top 3 (P173). Archive all findings. No further POWER_LOTTO strategy research until new structural data becomes available.
pros: Consistent with cumulative evidence (R1 + R2 Top 3 = no edge)
Avoids multiple-testing inflation from continued candidate evaluation
Honest about difficulty of finding edge in 38-number pool
cons: Does not fulfill user stated goal of exhaustive search
4 deferred candidates (C03/C05/C06/C07) have not been evaluated
May leave genuinely different approaches untried

options_reviewed.name: Proceed to advanced deferred candidates plan-only (C03/C05/C06/C07)
options_reviewed.description: Design a P175 plan-only artifact for the 4 deferred candidates. Do not implement prototype yet. P175 would define feature extraction specs, OOS protocol, and Bonferroni correction strategy for C03 (co-occurrence graph), C05 (dispersion), C06 (CUSUM regime-adaptive), C07 (hybrid aggregation).
pros: Fulfills user goal of exhaustive feature-engineering exploration
Plan-only is low risk — no implementation, no DB write
C03 (co-occurrence graph) and C06 (CUSUM) are genuinely different from C01/C02/C04 and from R1 signals
Preserves scientific rigor: P175 plan declares configs before any prototype
cons: C03 has HIGH overfitting risk (703 edges, aggressive Bonferroni family required)
C06 has HIGH overfitting risk (CUSUM threshold + multiple regime parameters)
C07 requires 4 feature families individually validated first (not done)
Diminishing returns expected given cumulative NULL evidence
More testing without prior evidence inflates Type I error risk
options_reviewed.reason: User explicitly wants exhaustive search. Plan-only carries minimal risk. The deferred candidates (especially C03/C06) are genuinely novel compared to R1 and to P173 Top 3. A plan-only step preserves governance without committing to implementation.

options_reviewed.name: Wait for new POWER_LOTTO draws only
options_reviewed.description: Pause all R2 research until at least 200 new POWER_LOTTO draws are available (draws after 115000041). Then re-evaluate C01/C02/C04 with larger OOS window before advancing to deferred candidates.
pros: More data improves statistical power without adding multiple testing burden
Cleaner null hypothesis: if C01/C02/C04 show signal with 200+ new draws, re-evaluation justified
cons: Currently 0 new draws available (last draw is 115000041 = 2026-05-21)
n_oos=1413 already provides substantial statistical power
Waiting does not address the deferred candidates
Passive — doesn't fulfill exhaustive search goal
options_reviewed.recommendation_status: DEFERRED — no new draws currently available

options_reviewed.name: Redirect R2 to different lottery type with stronger empirical anomalies
options_reviewed.description: Apply R2 feature engineering framework to DAILY_539 or BIG_LOTTO instead of POWER_LOTTO.
pros: DAILY_539 has smaller pool (1-39, choose 5) potentially easier signal detection
Different pool size may yield different feature efficacy
cons: DAILY_539 signal space exhausted in R1 (L82: H001-H008 all REJECTED)
BIG_LOTTO signal space exhausted in R1 (L91: 6 randomness tests all PASS, at-random confirmed)
Cross-lottery transfer history mixed: MidFreq/Fourier transferred to POWER_LOTTO (L83), ACB did not (L84)
Applying new feature types to exhausted games is unlikely to yield different result
options_reviewed.recommendation_status: NOT_RECOMMENDED — both alternative games have exhausted signal spaces per R1

options_reviewed.name: Meta-feature/ML feasibility audit only, no training
options_reviewed.description: Perform a read-only feasibility analysis of whether POWER_LOTTO draw sequences show any departure from randomness that could motivate ML/deep-learning approaches. No model training. Output: randomness audit report.
pros: Can be done in parallel with Option B planning
Provides principled upper-bound estimate of predictability before committing to complex models
cons: P161 signal boundary research (L91-equivalent analysis) already performed for similar purpose
options_reviewed.recommendation_status: OPTIONAL_PAIR — can be done alongside Option B if scope remains read-only

recommended_option.label: Proceed to advanced deferred candidates plan-only (C03/C05/C06/C07)
recommended_option.rationale: User has explicitly stated the goal is to exhaust all possibilities through feature engineering. The 4 deferred candidates — especially C03 (co-occurrence graph) and C06 (CUSUM regime-adaptive window) — represent genuinely novel approaches not evaluated in R1 or P173. Plan-only (P175) carries minimal governance risk. P175 must design all candidate configs, OOS protocols, and multiple-testing correction strategies before any prototype is authorized. This preserves user goal while maintaining scientific rigor.
recommended_option.conservative_caveat: Option B plan-only does NOT represent a finding of edge or likelihood of success. The prior probability remains LOW given cumulative R1+R2 NULL evidence. P175 must honestly report NULL if deferred candidates also fail corrected thresholds.
recommended_option.not_recommending_A_because: User goal is exhaustive search; Option A would leave 4 evaluated candidates on the table.
recommended_option.not_recommending_C_because: Zero new draws currently available; waiting is passive and does not address deferred candidates.
recommended_option.not_recommending_D_because: Both DAILY_539 and BIG_LOTTO have exhausted signal spaces per R1 findings (L82, L91).

p175_scope_boundary.scope: plan-only — no prototype script, no DB write, no training, no deployment
allowed_in_p175: plan artifact (JSON + MD) defining candidate specs
OOS protocol design for each candidate
leakage and overfitting risk assessment per candidate
data availability check for each candidate
p175_scope_boundary.p175_authorization_phrase: YES start P175 POWER_LOTTO R2 advanced feature candidate plan

C03_co_occurrence_pair_graph.multiple_testing_burden: C(38,2)=703 edges — Bonferroni family must account for pair space
C03_co_occurrence_pair_graph.leakage_risk: LOW if using pre-target draws only

C05_entropy_dispersion_controlled.multiple_testing_burden: MODERATE — fewer free parameters than C03/C06

C06_regime_adaptive_cusum.multiple_testing_burden: HIGH — CUSUM threshold + window size per regime
C06_regime_adaptive_cusum.leakage_risk: MEDIUM — one-sided causal CUSUM requires careful implementation
C06_regime_adaptive_cusum.p170_motivation: P170 confirmed non-stationarity supports regime-based approach but also means regime signal itself may be non-stationary

C07_hybrid_rank_aggregation.multiple_testing_burden: HIGH — weight grid over 4 feature families
C07_hybrid_rank_aggregation.dependency: Requires C01/C02/C04 components; P173 NULL suggests components are weak individually

next_task_authorization_required_phrase: YES start P175 POWER_LOTTO R2 advanced feature candidate plan
